preconditions: Every selected branch encoding is legal in its bundle slot
All target and fallthrough bundles are mapped
inputs: Direct, indirect, long, counted, top, exit, while, call, and return forms
expected_results: Every form selects its exact target or fallthrough and form-specific state
allowed_results: The literal target, link, frame, loop, and return goldens reported by all five probes
permitted_state_changes: IP and the selected form's architecturally declared state
required_unchanged_state: Unrelated registers, memory, predicates, and NaT state
cases.committed_prefix: A first taken form suppresses its suffix; false forms fall through without taken effects
cases.restart_action: Not exercised for mapped legal forms

oracle.derivation: Test-owned literal encodings and exact address/frame/count calculations define all expected states without production decoder tables
